text: I wake up at six every morning. After stretching briefly, I drink a glass of water and go for a twenty-minute jog. Then I shower, have a light breakfast, and leave for work by eight. My job starts at nine and finishes at five, with a short lunch break in between. In the evening, I either read a book or watch a series to relax. I also try to meditate for ten minutes before bed. This routine has become a habit, and it helps me stay productive and balanced throughout the week.
